title: Professional Invoicing
description: Create customizable invoices with automatic calculation of line items, taxes, and totals in seconds.

title: Client Management
description: Store all your customer details locally to auto-fill invoices and manage multiple clients effortlessly.

title: Local SQLite Database
description: Your financial data never touches the cloud. Everything is securely saved on your own machine using a robust local database.

title: Tax Calculations
description: Easily configure custom tax rates and let SharpIB handle the complex math for every client automatically.

title: PDF & Print Export
description: Generate print-ready PDFs of your invoices directly from the desktop interface, ready to send to clients.

title: Open Source
description: Built transparently on .NET 10 WPF. Inspect the code yourself, compile it locally, and own your billing fully.
